title: pouzolzia orientalis
intro: Pouzolzia orientalis, also known as the oriental pouzolzia or Indian nettle, is a species of flowering plant in the nettle family. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Pouzolzia orientalis is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Pouzolzia orientalis include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
